note: Queue UI exposes an admin overview UI, a set of Drush commands, one QueueUI inspection plugin type, and a single permission — but no config object. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want the admin page that lists every queue and its number of items, where I can process or clear a queue. What is the route name and its URL path?
evals.expected_output: The queue_ui.overview_form route at /admin/config/system/queue-ui (Admin → Config → System → Queue manager).

evals.prompt: From the Queue UI overview form, what are the three bulk actions I can apply to selected queues?
evals.expected_output: Batch process (run the worker via Batch API), Remove leases (reset lease timestamps), and Clear (delete all items after confirmation).

evals.prompt: Which Queue UI Drush command processes a single named queue, and what are its aliases? Also give the command to process all queues.
evals.expected_output: drush queue:process [queueName] (aliases qp, queue-process) processes one queue; drush queue:process-all (qpa) processes all queues.

evals.prompt: Some items in a Drupal queue are stuck with leases from a crashed worker. Which Queue UI Drush command resets (releases) the leases, and how do I do it for every queue at once?
evals.expected_output: drush queue:release [queueName] (aliases qr) releases leases on one queue; drush queue:release-all (qra) does it for all queues.

evals.prompt: I have a custom queue backend and want it to show up under Queue UI's Inspect view. What plugin type do I implement, which interface/attribute do I use, and what must match my backend?
evals.expected_output: Implement a QueueUI plugin (namespace Plugin/QueueUI) that implements QueueUIInterface / extends QueueUIBase, tagged with the #[QueueUI] attribute whose class_name matches your backend's queue class (short or full name). Managed by plugin.manager.queue_ui (QueueUIManager).

evals.prompt: What is the machine name of the permission Queue UI provides to access the queue manager and run/delete queues?
evals.expected_output: The single permission 'admin queue_ui' ("Administer queues") gates the whole Queue UI.

evals.prompt: Does Queue UI have its own configuration settings object, and what is the module's configure route?
evals.expected_output: Queue UI provides no config object of its own; its configure route is queue_ui.overview_form (the Queue manager overview). The only persisted flag is a State value queue_ui.features.
